title: hyptis mollis
intro: Hyptis mollis, also known as Brazilian hyptis or marsh hyptis, is a perennial plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy and as a natural insect repellent.
